class.name: RichTextEdit
class.brief_description: Multiline rich text editor with BBCode import and export.
class.description:
[RichTextEdit] is an editable text control that stores source text together with formatting spans. When [member bbcode_enabled] is enabled, [member TextEdit.text] is parsed as BBCode and the editable scene preview shows the parsed result. When [member bbcode_enabled] is disabled, [member TextEdit.text] is displayed literally. Call [method get_bbcode_text] to export the current text and formatting as BBCode. Formatting methods apply to the current selection. If there is no selection, they update the typing style used for text inserted at the caret. Visible formatting changes are recorded in the undo history. Supported inline styles are: - [code skip-lint][b][/code] for bold text. - [code skip-lint][i][/code] for italic text. - [code skip-lint][u][/code] for underlined text. - [code skip-lint][s][/code] for strikethrough text. - [code skip-lint][color][/code] for foreground color. - [code skip-lint][font_size][/code] and [code skip-lint][size][/code] for font size. - [code skip-lint][font][/code] and [code skip-lint][code][/code] for font selection. - [code skip-lint][bgcolor][/code], [code skip-lint][fgcolor][/code], [code skip-lint][outline_color][/code], and [code skip-lint][outline_size][/code] for additional style metadata. - [code skip-lint][url][/code] for URL metadata. URL ranges use the [theme_item link_color] theme color and are underlined by default when no explicit color or underline style is set. The [code skip-lint][url][/code] tag supports URL values, plus [code skip-lint]tooltip[/code], [code]visited[/code], and [code]underline[/code] attributes. URL tooltips use the default [Control] tooltip, and can be styled with the [code]TooltipPanel[/code] and [code]TooltipLabel[/code] theme types. - [code skip-lint][img][/code] for inline image objects. Supported block styles include [code skip-lint][quote][/code], [code skip-lint][left][/code], [code skip-lint][center][/code], [code skip-lint][right][/code], [code skip-lint][indent][/code], [code skip-lint][ul][/code], and [code skip-lint][ol][/code]. Ordered lists support [code skip-lint][ol start=][/code] to reset numbering to a custom value. Pressing [kbd]Enter[/kbd] inserts a line break that preserves the current style. Pressing [kbd]Shift[/kbd] + [kbd]Enter[/kbd] inserts a line break outside the current style. URL metadata activation is controlled by [member link_activation_mode]. By default, editable controls require [kbd]Ctrl[/kbd] + click ([kbd]Cmd[/kbd] + click on macOS), while non-editable controls activate links with a normal click. If [signal meta_clicked] is connected, the signal is emitted and no default action is taken. If it is not connected, [RichTextEdit] opens [code]http://[/code] and [code]https://[/code] URLs with [method OS.shell_open]. Use [RichTextEditToolbar] to add a standard formatting toolbar, you can also build a custom toolbar by calling the formatting APIs which RichTextEdit provides. [codeblocks] [gdscript skip-lint] @onready var editor: RichTextEdit = $RichTextEdit
func _ready(): editor.bbcode_enabled = true editor.text = "Hello [b]bold[/b] and [color=red]red[/color] text"
func save_text(): var stored_bbcode := editor.get_bbcode_text() [/gdscript] [/codeblocks]

method.name: get_bbcode_text
method.description: Returns the current text and formatting as BBCode. Plain text is escaped where needed, and styled ranges are written with their corresponding BBCode tags.

method.name: get_current_font_size
method.description: Returns the font size at the current editing position. If text is selected, this uses the first selected character. If the caret is at the beginning of a non-empty line, this uses the first character in that line. Otherwise, this uses the character before the caret. If no explicit font size is set, the default editor font size is returned.

method.name: get_link_activation_mode
method.description: Returns how URL metadata is activated.

method.name: set_bold
method.description: Adds bold formatting to the current selection. If there is no selection, adds bold to the typing style used for newly inserted text.

method.name: clear_bold
method.description: Removes bold formatting from the current selection. If there is no selection, removes bold from the typing style used for newly inserted text.

method.name: toggle_bold
method.description: Toggles bold formatting on the current selection. If there is no selection, toggles bold in the typing style used for newly inserted text.

method.name: set_italic
method.description: Adds italic formatting to the current selection. If there is no selection, adds italic to the typing style used for newly inserted text.

method.name: clear_italic
method.description: Removes italic formatting from the current selection. If there is no selection, removes italic from the typing style used for newly inserted text.

method.name: toggle_italic
method.description: Toggles italic formatting on the current selection. If there is no selection, toggles italic in the typing style used for newly inserted text.

method.name: set_underline
method.description: Adds underline formatting to the current selection. If there is no selection, adds underline to the typing style used for newly inserted text.

method.name: clear_underline
method.description: Removes underline formatting from the current selection. If there is no selection, removes underline from the typing style used for newly inserted text.

method.name: toggle_underline
method.description: Toggles underline formatting on the current selection. If there is no selection, toggles underline in the typing style used for newly inserted text.

method.name: set_strikethrough
method.description: Adds strikethrough formatting to the current selection. If there is no selection, adds strikethrough to the typing style used for newly inserted text.

method.name: clear_strikethrough
method.description: Removes strikethrough formatting from the current selection. If there is no selection, removes strikethrough from the typing style used for newly inserted text.

method.name: toggle_strikethrough
method.description: Toggles strikethrough formatting on the current selection. If there is no selection, toggles strikethrough in the typing style used for newly inserted text.

method.name: set_bbcode_text
method.description: Parses [param text] as BBCode and replaces the editor contents with the resulting plain text, formatting, and inline objects. Display-only rich text tags that are not editable yet are preserved for round-tripping.

method.name: set_link_activation_mode
method.description: Sets how URL metadata is activated.

method.name: set_selection_color
method.description: Sets the foreground color for the current selection. If there is no selection, changes the color used for newly inserted text.

method.name: clear_selection_color
method.description: Removes explicit foreground color from the current selection. If there is no selection, clears the foreground color from the typing style.

method.name: set_selection_bg_color
method.description: Sets background color metadata for the current selection, or the typing style if there is no selection.

method.name: clear_selection_bg_color
method.description: Removes explicit background color metadata from the current selection, or the typing style if there is no selection.

method.name: set_selection_outline_color
method.description: Sets outline color metadata for the current selection, or the typing style if there is no selection.

method.name: clear_selection_outline_color
method.description: Removes explicit outline color metadata from the current selection, or the typing style if there is no selection.

method.name: set_selection_outline_size
method.description: Sets outline size metadata for the current selection, or the typing style if there is no selection.

method.name: clear_selection_outline_size
method.description: Removes explicit outline size metadata from the current selection, or the typing style if there is no selection.

method.name: begin_selection_color_preview
method.description: Starts a color preview by saving the current formatting state. Use this before repeatedly calling [method preview_selection_color] from a custom color picker or toolbar.

method.name: preview_selection_color
method.description: Previews [param color] on the current selection, or on the typing style if there is no selection, without adding an undo history entry. If no preview is active, this method starts one automatically.

method.name: end_selection_color_preview
method.description: Ends the active color preview. If [param commit] is [code]true[/code], the previewed color change is kept as one undoable formatting action when text is selected. If [param commit] is [code]false[/code], the saved formatting state is restored.

method.name: set_selection_font_size
method.description: Sets the font size for the current selection. If there is no selection, changes the font size used for newly inserted text.

method.name: clear_selection_font_size
method.description: Removes explicit font size from the current selection. If there is no selection, clears the font size from the typing style.

method.name: set_selection_font
method.description: Sets a font resource path for the current selection, or the typing style if there is no selection.

method.name: clear_selection_font
method.description: Removes explicit font metadata from the current selection, or the typing style if there is no selection.

method.name: set_selection_url
method.description: Sets URL metadata for the current selection. If there is no selection, changes the URL metadata used for newly inserted text. Non-empty URLs are underlined by default, but underline can still be toggled independently.

method.name: clear_selection_url
method.description: Removes URL metadata from the current selection. If there is no selection, clears URL metadata from the typing style.

method.name: set_selection_url_tooltip
method.description: Sets the [code skip-lint]tooltip[/code] attribute on URL ranges touched by the selection. If there is no selection, sets it on the URL range at the caret, if any.

method.name: clear_selection_url_tooltip
method.description: Removes the [code skip-lint]tooltip[/code] attribute from URL ranges touched by the selection. If there is no selection, removes it from the URL range at the caret, if any.

method.name: set_selection_url_visited
method.description: Sets the [code]visited[/code] attribute on URL ranges touched by the selection. If there is no selection, sets it on the URL range at the caret, if any.

method.name: clear_selection_url_visited
method.description: Removes the [code]visited[/code] attribute from URL ranges touched by the selection. If there is no selection, removes it from the URL range at the caret, if any.

method.name: toggle_code
method.description: Toggles code font formatting on the current selection. If there is no selection, toggles code formatting in the typing style used for newly inserted text.

method.name: insert_image
method.description: Inserts an inline image object at the caret using [param source] as the image resource path. Supported paths include project resources such as [code]res://icon.svg[/code], user data paths such as [code]user://image.png[/code], and local absolute paths such as [code]C:/images/photo.jpg[/code] on Windows or [code]/home/user/photo.png[/code] on Unix-like platforms. [param width] and [param height] allow [code]0[/code]. If one size is negative, only the other size is written and the missing size is resolved from the image ratio. If both sizes are negative, no size attributes are written. If [param alt] is empty, no [code skip-lint]alt[/code] attribute is written. The image is exported as an [code skip-lint][img][/code] BBCode tag.

method.name: set_selection_image_size
method.description: Sets the size of selected inline images. [param width] and [param height] allow [code]0[/code]. If one size is negative, only the other size is written and the missing size is resolved from the image ratio. If both sizes are negative, this method does nothing.

method.name: set_alignment
method.description: Applies paragraph alignment to the selected lines, or the current line if there is no selection.

method.name: toggle_quote
method.description: Toggles quote formatting on the selected lines, or the current line if there is no selection.

method.name: set_quote
method.description: Formats the selected lines, or the current line if there is no selection, as a quote block.

method.name: clear_quote
method.description: Removes quote formatting from the selected lines, or the current line if there is no selection.

method.name: toggle_unordered_list
method.description: Toggles unordered list formatting on the selected lines, or the current line if there is no selection.

method.name: set_unordered_list
method.description: Formats the selected lines, or the current line if there is no selection, as an unordered list.

method.name: clear_unordered_list
method.description: Removes unordered list formatting from the selected lines, or the current line if there is no selection.

method.name: toggle_ordered_list
method.description: Toggles ordered list formatting on the selected lines, or the current line if there is no selection.

method.name: set_ordered_list
method.description: Formats the selected lines, or the current line if there is no selection, as an ordered list.

method.name: clear_ordered_list
method.description: Removes ordered list formatting from the selected lines, or the current line if there is no selection.

method.name: increase_indent
method.description: Applies BBCode indentation to the selected lines, or the current line if there is no selection.

method.name: decrease_indent
method.description: Removes BBCode block indentation, list, or alignment metadata from the selected lines, or the current line if there is no selection.

members.member: If [code]true[/code], [member TextEdit.text] is parsed as BBCode and supported tags are previewed in the editor. If [code]false[/code], [member TextEdit.text] is displayed literally.
The current contents as BBCode. Setting this property parses the assigned BBCode and replaces the editor contents with the resulting plain text, formatting, and inline objects.

Controls how URL metadata is activated. In [constant LINK_ACTIVATION_AUTO], editable controls require [kbd]Ctrl[/kbd] + click ([kbd]Cmd[/kbd] + click on macOS), while non-editable controls activate links with a normal click.

signal.name: meta_clicked
signal.description: Emitted when the user activates URL metadata according to [member link_activation_mode]. For BBCode [code skip-lint][url][/code] tags, [param meta] is the URL string.

signal.name: meta_hover_ended
signal.description: Emitted when the mouse exits URL metadata.

signal.name: meta_hover_started
signal.description: Emitted when the mouse enters URL metadata.

signal.name: text_style_changed
signal.description: Emitted when rich text formatting metadata changes. This can happen without changing the plain text contents.

constants.constant: Activates URL metadata with [kbd]Ctrl[/kbd] + click ([kbd]Cmd[/kbd] + click on macOS) when [member TextEdit.editable] is [code]true[/code], and with a normal click when [member TextEdit.editable] is [code]false[/code].
Activates URL metadata only with [kbd]Ctrl[/kbd] + click ([kbd]Cmd[/kbd] + click on macOS).
Activates URL metadata with a normal click.

theme_items.theme_item: Default text color for URL metadata while it is being activated.
Default text color for URL metadata when the range has no explicit text color.
Default text color for URL metadata while the mouse is hovering it.
Default text color for URL metadata after the URL has been activated.
Font used by URL metadata tooltips.
Text color used by URL metadata tooltips.
Font size used by URL metadata tooltips.
Panel style used by URL metadata tooltips.
Border color for [code skip-lint][quote][/code] block paragraphs.
Default text color for [code skip-lint][quote][/code] block paragraphs when the range has no explicit text color.
Width of the left border for [code skip-lint][quote][/code] block paragraphs.
Horizontal padding between the quote border and quote text.
Additional bottom margin for [code skip-lint][quote][/code] block paragraphs.
Additional top margin for [code skip-lint][quote][/code] block paragraphs.
